ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2019-2020) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the season belongs to */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of the season (e.g., regular season, playoffs, postseason) */,
  "season_logo" TEXT /* Logo or image URL of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport associated with the league */,
  "league_website" TEXT /* Website of the league */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Founding year of the league */,
  "league_logo" TEXT /* Logo or image URL of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* Website of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the team is based */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* Logo or image URL of the team */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium or arena where the team plays */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium or arena where the team plays */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* High school of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted */,
  "contract_salary" REAL /* Salary of the player's contract */,
  "contract_years" INTEGER /* Number of years remaining on the player's contract */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture or image URL of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the game belongs to */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance of the game */,
  "overtime_periods" INTEGER /* Number of overtime periods played */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Penalty minutes in the game */,
  "recap" TEXT /* Recap or summary of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made in the game */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds in the game */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals in the game */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks in the game */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers in the game */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Three-pointers made in the game */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Free throws made in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_season_statistics" (
  "player_season_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player season statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the statistic belongs to */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player in the season */,
  "minutes_played" REAL /* Minutes played by the player in the season */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player in the season */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player in the season */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the player in the season */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals by the player in the season */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks by the player in the season */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers by the player in the season */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage of the player in the season */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage of the player in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_season_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_season_statistics" (
  "team_season_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team season statistic entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the statistic belongs to */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the team in the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team in the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team in the season */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team in the season */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points scored against the team in the season */,
  "rebounds_for" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the team in the season */,
  "rebounds_against" INTEGER /* Total rebounds against the team in the season */,
  "team_three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage of the team in the season */,
  "team_free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage of the team in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_season_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_season_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_season_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_career_statistics" (
  "player_career_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player career statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total number of games played by the player in their career */,
  "minutes_played" REAL /* Total minutes played by the player in their career */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player in their career */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player in their career */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the player in their career */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals by the player in their career */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks by the player in their career */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers by the player in their career */,
  "career_three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage of the player in their career */,
  "career_free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage of the player in their career */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_career_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_career_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach manages */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the coach was hired */,
  "date_fired" TEXT /* Date the coach was fired (if applicable) */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the coach */,
  "coaching_record" TEXT /* Coaching record of the coach */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture or image URL of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., web, mobile app) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device details of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., live feed, historical database) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL or path to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection event */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source used */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "collection_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was collected */,
  "data_volume" REAL /* Volume of data collected in MB */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method of data collection (e.g., API, web scraping) */,
  "error_logs" TEXT /* Error logs of the data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_logs_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the event belongs to */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance of the event */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the event */,
  "recap" TEXT /* Recap or summary of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_events_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who sustained the injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "expected_return_date" TEXT /* Expected date of return from the injury */,
  "actual_return_date" TEXT /* Actual date of return from the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., sprain, strain, fracture) */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment received for the injury */,
  "recovery_details" TEXT /* Details of the recovery process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
